context: Tests whether the agent uses the two-step composition plan workflow (composition_plan.create then compose), passes music_length_ms to composition_plan.create, inspects plan properties, avoids passing both prompt and composition_plan to compose, saves audio by iterating chunks, and does not incorrectly use force_instrumental with a composition plan.

checklist.name: Uses composition_plan.create
checklist.description: Script calls client.music.composition_plan.create() to generate a plan before composing audio

checklist.name: music_length_ms in plan creation
checklist.description: music_length_ms is passed as an argument to composition_plan.create() (it is required for that method)

checklist.name: Inspects plan properties
checklist.description: Script accesses plan.positiveGlobalStyles (or equivalent) and iterates over plan.sections to print structure information

checklist.name: compose uses composition_plan
checklist.description: music.compose() is called with composition_plan=plan (or composition_plan=plan equivalent) — not with a prompt string

checklist.name: No dual prompt+plan
checklist.description: music.compose() call does NOT pass both a prompt and a composition_plan simultaneously

checklist.name: No force_instrumental with plan
checklist.description: Script does NOT pass force_instrumental when using composition_plan mode (force_instrumental is prompt-mode only)

checklist.name: Audio saved via chunk iteration
checklist.description: Audio is saved by iterating over the response stream in chunks (for chunk in audio: f.write(chunk)) rather than writing the stream object directly

checklist.name: elevenlabs Python package
checklist.description: requirements.txt includes 'elevenlabs' as a dependency and script imports from 'elevenlabs'

checklist.name: Environment variable for API key
checklist.description: Client is instantiated using ElevenLabs() with no hardcoded API key (relies on ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable)
